theme: Are We Too Fixated on Protein?

sentences.english: Of all the main food groups, such as carbohydrate, fat and fibre, it's protein that seems to be most in the news.
sentences.korean: 탄수화물, 지방, 섬유질 같은 주요 영양소 중 뉴스에 가장 많이 나오는 건 단백질이에요.

sentences.english: You'll find all kinds of high-protein foods being advertised.
Cast your eye over most aisles in the supermarket and you'll notice a lot of the big brands advertising protein on their packaging.
sentences.korean: 슈퍼마켓 대부분의 통로를 훑어보면 많은 대형 브랜드가 포장에 단백질을 광고하는 걸 알아차릴 거예요.

quiz.question: What does '~이 부족한' mean in English?
